getStarted.title: Get Started
getStarted.text: Want to get involved? Read the wiki to understand the project, or jump straight in and contribute.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Sustainable • Modular • Decentralized
about.description: Akku-Craft is a universal, modular battery system designed to actively reduce electronic waste. Thanks to decentralized monitoring and precise cell balancing, the system guarantees a safe, long-lasting, and sustainable power supply for a wide variety of devices.
about.teamHenry: Circuit Design, 3D Modeling, Website Developer & IT-Management

projects.description: Arduino firmware for our battery management system.
